description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I arrived at 6:00 PM but it was a bummer because the power was out... Thank God the power came back on after Maghrib, and it was very comfortable, especially since I brought my family, it was very fun and we could joke around freely. Thank you.
comments.originalComment: Awal datang pukul 18.00 wib zonk Krn listrik mati.... Alhamdulillah sehabis magrib listrik hidup dan seterusnya sangat nyaman apalagi bawa keluarga JD sangat seru dan bebas bercanda. Terimksh
